name: Focus Hybrid

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E42C9D9E-6CC8-4EDA-A81F-63BA87D70CA0

comment: Offering an efficient 200W LED light source combined with an extensive feature set, the ADJ Focus Hybrid is a versatile moving head luminaire. It can function interchangeably as a spot, wash or beam fixture, making it ideal for rental and event production applications as well as for installation in venues that require a moving light which can deliver a high degree of flexibility. It features motorized zoom and focus, two GOBO wheels, an independent color wheel, two rotating prisms and a replaceable frost filter.

gwSpecs.description: Offering an efficient 200W LED light source combined with an extensive feature set, the ADJ Focus Hybrid is a versatile moving head luminaire. It can function interchangeably as a spot, wash or beam fixture, making it ideal for rental and event production applications as well as for installation in venues that require a moving light which can deliver a high degree of flexibility. It features motorized zoom and focus, two GOBO wheels, an independent color wheel, two rotating prisms and a replaceable frost filter.
